required_data_element: count of compatible 60 g drinking episodes
candidate_data_source: BRFSS/NSDUH alcohol-frequency and binge-drinking items; high-intensity drinking surveillance
coverage_population: community-dwelling adults; definitions vary by survey
known_limitation: No source identifies exact 60 g within 2 hours for every counted episode and links the episode to the target outcomes.

candidate_data_source: NHAMCS ED data; NCHS mortality; FARS/NVDRS for selected injury outcomes
coverage_population: patients/decedents, not the full exposed population
known_limitation: Outcome systems rarely record exact grams, drinking duration, dependence exclusion, or matched no-use periods.

required_data_element: same population/place/period or defensible transport model
candidate_data_source: No national source located that links exact 60 g episodes to all prespecified 24-hour outcomes
known_limitation: Separate survey denominators and outcome numerators would require strong, currently untestable transport and attribution assumptions.

coverage_population: U.S. civilian noninstitutionalized population; tobacco users and nonusers
known_limitation: Repeated behavior is strong, but exact sustained 20-cigarette/day and complete-cessation strategies require emulation, censoring, and weighting.

candidate_data_source: NCHS linked mortality files; PATH health-condition/biomarker data; restricted linked claims may be needed
known_limitation: No single located source jointly supplies repeated smoking strategy, adjudicated mortality, and all incident diseases for the exact target population.

candidate_data_source: PATH repeated covariates plus external linked outcome sources
known_limitation: Attrition, exposure misclassification, latency, and positivity for sustained strategies are material; cancer power is likely poor.

required_data_element: number of intranasal episodes in opioid-tolerant users
candidate_data_source: No representative national episode-count source located
known_limitation: Surveys measure use days or persons, not intranasal episodes with tolerance, dose, co-use, and market-year specificity.

required_data_element: fatal and severe toxicity within 24 hours
known_limitation: Strong for event description but cannot produce absolute per-episode risk without compatible exposure counts.

required_data_element: representative composition and potency distribution linked to episodes
candidate_data_source: DEA laboratory/seizure data; community drug-checking programs
coverage_population: seized or submitted samples, not a probability sample of consumed episodes
known_limitation: Seizure/testing samples are selection-biased and generally not linkable to the people and episodes in outcome systems.

required_data_element: 25 mg synthetic psilocybin with controlled support
candidate_data_source: NCT03866174 / Raison et al. 2023; other completed and ongoing trial records
coverage_population: trial-eligible adults with MDD or adjacent depressive populations
known_limitation: At least one direct MDD trial exists; other trials differ in treatment resistance, comparator, psychotherapy, and eligibility.

candidate_data_source: NCT03866174 used active placebo; NCT03775200 used 1 mg psilocybin control
known_limitation: Control conditions are not interchangeable and functional unblinding is likely; comparator directness must be coded study by study.

required_data_element: complete serious and severe event counts through 7 days
candidate_data_source: trial publications, supplements, registry results, and author queries
known_limitation: Small samples and zero-event arms cannot precisely estimate rare serious outcomes; reporting windows and event definitions may differ.
